message:
Port `deduplicate` operator to new test framework (#5800)

## Summary

- Fix linker error and `run_chain` explicit instantiation signatures
- Port `deduplicate` operator implementation changes
- Move deduplicate tests from `test-legacy/` to
`test/tests/operators/deduplicate/`

## Test plan

- [x] CI passes
- [x] Deduplicate integration tests pass with `uvx tenzir-test --root
test --match '*deduplicate*'`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

<sub>resolves TNZ-101</sub>

files.patch:
@@ -7,5 +7,4 @@ from {x: 1, seq: 1},
      {x: 2, seq: 7},
      {x: 2, seq: 8},
      {x: 1, seq: 9}
-batch
 deduplicate x, distance=3, count_field=drop_count
